blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 427 ft. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 58 mph may cause lift holds.
